name: Sarashina2-70B
note: MIT-licensed Japanese base model trained ground-up on ~2.1T tokens of Japanese, English, and code; not instruction-tuned.
tpsNote: 70B does not fit in a single RTX 4090's 24GB VRAM at Q4 (~40GB needed); no verified single-GPU measurement found.

results.notes: 5-shot accuracy, from the Swallow LLM Leaderboard (Institute of Science Tokyo / Swallow project) English-task evaluation table. Row verified: 'En' average (0.4945) exactly equals the mean of the 9 English-task scores in Sarashina2-70B's row, confirming correct column alignment. [unit-corrected during round4 verify-merge: source table reports as a 0-1 fraction (0.6303), normalized to percentage to match corpus convention]

4-shot exact-match accuracy per Swallow leaderboard methodology (llm-jp eval harness). Very low score is plausible for a non-instruction-tuned Japanese base model under strict few-shot exact-match without CoT prompting. [unit-corrected during round4 verify-merge: source table reports as a 0-1 fraction (0.0106), normalized to percentage]
3-shot chain-of-thought exact-match accuracy, Swallow LLM Leaderboard. [unit-corrected during round4 verify-merge: source table reports as a 0-1 fraction (0.6386), normalized to percentage]

0-shot pass@1 (10 trials), Swallow LLM Leaderboard (llm-jp / bigcode-evaluation-harness). [unit-corrected during round4 verify-merge: source table reports as a 0-1 fraction (0.2799), normalized to percentage]
From Swallow LLM Leaderboard English-task table. [unit-corrected during round4 verify-merge: source table reports as a 0-1 fraction (0.627), normalized to percentage]
From Swallow LLM Leaderboard English-task table. [unit-corrected during round4 verify-merge: source table reports as a 0-1 fraction (0.392), normalized to percentage]
From Swallow LLM Leaderboard English-task table. [unit-corrected during round4 verify-merge: source table reports as a 0-1 fraction (0.5373), normalized to percentage]

Listed as 'XWINO' column in the Swallow LLM Leaderboard English-task table; mapped to xwinograd. [unit-corrected during round4 verify-merge: source table reports as a 0-1 fraction (0.9178), normalized to percentage]

This is the Japanese-only subset of MGSM (4-shot exact match), listed under the leaderboard's 'Japanese tasks' column group, not a full multilingual MGSM average. Mapped to mgsm as the closest/only matching taxonomy slug; flagging the single-language caveat. [unit-corrected during round4 verify-merge: source table reports as a 0-1 fraction (0.488), normalized to percentage]

verificationNotes: Confirmed real model. HF config.json (fetched) shows LlamaForCausalLM architecture, max_position_embeddings=8192 (=ctxK 8), hidden_size 8192, 80 layers — consistent with a 70B-class dense Llama-style model. HF commit history (fetched) shows the initial commit was made 2024-08-06, exactly matching the claimed releaseDate (a separate SB Intuitions tech-blog post about the model was dated 2024-08-21, but the HF repo's own commit history is the more precise/primary source and is used here). MIT license and 'not instruction-tuned' base-model status confirmed via search of SB Intuitions' own materials. 2.1T token / Japanese-English-code training mix confirmed via search results describing the Sarashina2 series (Japanese:English:Code ratio 5:4:1, ~2.1T tokens total). No results rows were present to check. No changes needed.
